title: Sniply's Optimized
body:
# Sniply's Optimized A modpack that replicates many of optifines features based upon the following list [https://optifine.alternatives.lambdaurora.dev](https://optifine.alternatives.lambdaurora.dev). This modpack also takes inspiration from [https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) and [https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized). The mod settings for the most part are at their defaults. The one exception is that I disable VSync and FPS limit in Minecraft options. I do my best to ensure this modpack is as compadible as possible with other mods. If you have issues, create a new ticket on the issue tracker in Discord. The current release is for 1.21.1 if you want all features. I am working on a release for 1.21.4 however some features are missing from the alpha as mod authors update their mods. Current list of mods:
  • Animatica [0.6.1+1.21] by FoundationGames
  • Better Mount HUD [1.2.4] by Lortseam
  • CIT Resewn [1.2.2+1.21] by SHsuperCM

  • Cloth Config v15 [15.0.140] by shedaniel
  • Continuity [3.0.0+1.21] by PepperCode1
  • Cubes Without Borders [3.0.0+mc1.21] by Kir_Antipov
  • Dark Loading Screen [1.6.14] by Neecko5b84
  • Debugify [1.21.1+1.0] by isXander
  • Dynamic FPS [3.9.0] by juliand665, LostLuma
